title: phyllanthus sandwicensis var. oblongifolius
intro: Phyllanthus sandwicensis var. oblongifolius, also known as the oblong-leaved island cheesefruit or Ma'o hau hele, is a variant of the Phyllanthus sandwicensis plant species. This plant is a type of shrub native to Hawaii and has been traditionally used in medicine and herbal remedies. The medicinal properties of Phyllanthus sandwicensis var. oblongifolius include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and increased antioxidant levels, which can be obtained through herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, or extracts.
